CVE-2026-0001.description: Remote Code Execution vulnerability in Apache Struts v4.2 due to improper input validation in HTTP Content-Type headers. Allows unauthenticated OGNL injection leading to full server compromise.

CVE-2026-0002.description: SQL Injection vulnerability in Auth Service database helper allows remote extraction of user records.

CVE-2026-0003.description: Path Traversal vulnerability in static file serving service allows reading arbitrary files.

CVE-2026-0004.description: Privilege Escalation vulnerability in Container Runtime allows local users to gain root access.

CVE-2026-0005.description: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Admin Dashboard input fields enables session hijacking.

CVE-2026-0006.description: Authentication bypass vulnerability in API Gateway permits unauthorized access using crafted tokens.

CVE-2026-0007.description: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in File Processing Service may lead to arbitrary code execution.

CVE-2026-0008.description: Denial of Service vulnerability in Load Balancer allows attackers to exhaust worker threads.

CVE-2026-0009.description: Information Disclosure vulnerability in Debug Endpoint exposes internal configuration files.

CVE-2026-0010.description: Server-Side Request Forgery vulnerability in Image Processing API enables access to internal resources.

CVE-2026-0011.description: Command Injection vulnerability in Backup Scheduler permits execution of arbitrary system commands.

CVE-2026-0012.description: Weak cryptographic implementation in Token Service allows predictable session token generation.

CVE-2026-0013.description: Directory Listing vulnerability in Web Portal exposes confidential uploaded documents to unauthenticated users.

CVE-2026-0014.description: Insecure deserialization vulnerability in Message Queue Service allows remote code execution.

CVE-2026-0015.description: Improper access control in Cloud Storage Gateway permits unauthorized modification of backup archives.

CVE-2026-0016.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) in Billing Portal payment setup allows unauthorized subscription state changes.

CVE-2026-0017.description: XML External Entity (XXE) injection in XML parsing component of the Document Management System allows remote document retrieval.

CVE-2026-0018.description: LDAP Injection vulnerability in Keycloak IAM user search component allows authentication bypass or information leakage.

CVE-2026-0019.description: Open Redirect vulnerability in Customer Portal login callback handler allows redirection to arbitrary malicious domains.

CVE-2026-0020.description: Prototype Pollution in Node.js utility helper inside API Gateway enables remote code execution or denial of service.

CVE-2026-0021.description: Local File Inclusion (LFI) in Internal Wiki theme settings permits directory traversal and local file disclosure.

CVE-2026-0022.description: Weak cryptographic key generation in OAuth token signing service allows token forgery.

CVE-2026-0023.description: JWT validation failure in gateway microservice permits access token forgery by omitting signature validation check.

CVE-2026-0024.description: Session Fixation vulnerability in Finance App allows session hijacking by pre-generating session IDs.

CVE-2026-0025.description: Race Condition in transaction processing engine enables double spending or account balance manipulation.

CVE-2026-0026.description: Insecure Deserialization in Java RMI registry helper on ML Server leads to arbitrary code execution.

CVE-2026-0027.description: API rate limiting abuse vulnerability in CRM gateway allows full database scraping due to lack of throttling.

CVE-2026-0028.description: OAuth 2.0 redirect URL misconfiguration in Identity Provider leads to authorization code leakage.

CVE-2026-0029.description: Broken Access Control in billing history endpoint allows unauthenticated viewing of other users' PDF invoices.

CVE-2026-0030.description: Remote Code Execution (RCE) in Apache Log4j v2 library allows full server takeover via LDAP lookup patterns.

CVE-2026-0031.description: SQL Injection in Search Cluster admin panel allows extraction of indices metadata.

CVE-2026-0032.description: Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in search query parameters on Customer Portal.

CVE-2026-0033.description: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in webhook integration on GitLab repository server.

CVE-2026-0034.description: Path Traversal in backup file download handler allows reading files from host system.

CVE-2026-0035.description: Buffer Overflow in Redis Cache Cluster memory allocation routines allows remote crash or arbitrary execution.

CVE-2026-0036.description: Authentication Bypass in VPN Gateway due to improper handling of null characters in username input.

CVE-2026-0037.description: Privilege Escalation in Kubernetes kubelet API allows execution of arbitrary commands inside pods.

CVE-2026-0038.description: Command Injection in CI/CD pipeline script parser allows runners to execute commands on the host master.

CVE-2026-0039.description: Secret Exposure in Jenkins build console logs reveals AWS access keys and deployment credentials.

CVE-2026-0040.description: Improper Validation of XML signatures in IAM Gateway allows assertion spoofing.

CVE-2026-0041.description: Unauthenticated Directory Traversal in Prometheus configuration loader allows viewing file directory structure.

CVE-2026-0042.description: Billion Laughs XML entity expansion attack in SOAP engine causes Denial of Service.

CVE-2026-0043.description: Improper input sanitization in command executor in ML Model Server allows arbitrary bash command execution.

CVE-2026-0044.description: Broken Object Level Authorization (BOLA) in Customer Portal endpoint allows modification of customer records.

CVE-2026-0045.description: Weak encryption algorithm usage in internal backup utility enables decryption of archived database tables.

CVE-2026-0046.description: Session hijacking vulnerability via predictable session identifier generation in CRM Portal.

CVE-2026-0047.description: Heap buffer overflow in RabbitMQ parsing engine leads to crash or remote execution.

CVE-2026-0048.description: Open Redirect in login redirect parameter in Employee HR Portal.

CVE-2026-0049.description: Insecure direct object reference (IDOR) in billing document controller exposes transaction IDs.

CVE-2026-0050.description: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in cloud metadata parsing logic of Kubernetes Control Plane.

CVE-2026-0051.description: SQL Injection in ERP module invoice database helper permits arbitrary table drop.

CVE-2026-0052.description: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in Grafana dashboard title editor allowing execution of scripts by admin users.

CVE-2026-0053.description: Command Injection in Git repository server webhooks configuration page.

CVE-2026-0054.description: Broken Function Level Authorization in secret vault administrative panel enables unprivileged read.

CVE-2026-0055.description: XML External Entity (XXE) injection in SAML single sign-on processor.

CVE-2026-0056.description: Improper JWT validation in payments gateway service permits bypassing authentication.

CVE-2026-0057.description: Denial of Service (DoS) in DNS resolver due to amplification attack vulnerabilities.

CVE-2026-0058.description: Weak SSH cipher configuration in GitLab repository server allows eavesdropping on sessions.

CVE-2026-0059.description: Path Traversal in MinIO storage file upload endpoint allows writing files outside the bucket path.

CVE-2026-0060.description: Deserialization of Untrusted Data in Apache Kafka messaging connector allows remote execution of arbitrary code.
